g.text: Yocto Recipe Dependency Graph — DEPENDS vs RDEPENDS
This saves build time on multi-core hosts.
Recipe B must finish building before
Recipe A can start. Uses the kernel build tree,
native tools, or libraries at compile time.
Recipe A needs Recipe B's package
in the rootfs at runtime. Does NOT block the
to include in the final root filesystem.
can compile without the kernel module
is installed into the rootfs alongside
the app at image assembly time.
